name: BAE Systems
notes: Largest single MOD supplier. 16.3% of MOD spend in 2024/25. 86% non-competitive contracts.

name: Rolls-Royce
notes: Unity programme for nuclear submarine reactors. Landmark 9bn contract awarded Jan 2025.

name: Balfour Beatty
notes: HS2 N1/N2 JV with Vinci (5bn). Lower Thames Crossing roads north (1.2bn).

name: Leidos
notes: LCST logistics contract since 2015. MOD spent 3.65bn with Leidos since 2016.

name: General Dynamics
notes: Troubled Ajax programme. 165 of 589 vehicles delivered. Full capability expected 2029-30.

name: Serco
notes: Asylum accommodation (1.9bn), Royal Navy maritime services (1.03bn), London Cycle Hire.

name: Thales
notes: 2.9bn maritime sensor support contract in procurement. Minehunting command centres.

name: Kier
notes: HS2 C2/C3 JV (2.27bn). HMP Glasgow super prison (684m). DfE 15bn framework.

name: Babcock International
notes: 63% of global revenue from MOD. British Army SPTC extension (£1.6bn, Mar 2025). BISS26 boats support (£283.5m shared, Apr 2026). FMSP 2-yr extension (£~2bn est., Apr 2026). White Fleet Phoenix 3 (£60m, Mar 2026).

name: QinetiQ
notes: T3E services (1.5bn). Typhoon support (205m). DragonFire laser weapons (67m).

name: Mitie
notes: HMP Millsike green prison (329m). DfT IFM (297m). HMRC FM (130m). DWP security.

name: Leonardo
notes: New Medium Helicopter AW149 (1bn for 23 aircraft). Awarded March 2026.

name: Infosys
notes: NHS workforce solution replacing ESR. 15-year contract for 1.9M staff payroll.

name: BT
notes: Public Emergency Services Network replacing Airwave. Signed 2023.

name: Mears Group
notes: Asylum accommodation across Scotland, NI, NE England, Yorkshire.

name: Capita
notes: Synergy BPS for 4 depts (959m). Civil Service Pension Scheme (239m).

name: Maximus
notes: Functional Assessment Services replacing Atos. 3.5M+ disability evaluations.

name: AWS
notes: Three 3-year cloud contracts awarded same day (Dec 2023). Home Office 450m, HMRC 350m, DWP 94m.

name: Capgemini
notes: HMRC main contract (574m). Part of 3.8bn HMRC IT spend over 5 years.

name: Oracle
notes: Synergy ERP with IBM (710m). Home Office cloud (54m). 10-year cross-departmental deal.

name: Fujitsu
notes: Self-imposed ban on new govt customers since Jan 2024 (Post Office Horizon scandal). HMRC 220m, Post Office 511m.

name: Palantir
notes: NHS Federated Data Platform (7yr, £330M, Nov 2023). MOD Defence Data Analytics Enterprise Agreement (3yr, £240.6M, awarded Dec 2025, direct award). Total gov contracts: £570.6M.

name: DXC Technology
notes: Met Police digital transformation (370m). MOD SECRET domain (76m).

name: Deloitte
departments: Dept for Energy Security & Net Zero
Dept of Health and Social Care
notes: Largest govt consulting supplier. DESNZ (339m). Test & Trace (298m). HMRC customs (100m). One Login (28m).

name: KPMG
notes: Cabinet Office L&D (223m). Follows previous 237m contract. Brexit support (30m share).

name: PwC
notes: Largest Big Four government consulting share. Primary client was DfID. Brexit support.

name: EY
notes: Dept of Health accounts for 78% of EY government business.

name: Accenture
notes: HMRC customs and borders. DALAS framework. Test & Trace (30m). Brexit support (30m share). DLIS digital logistics for MOD (£113m, Feb 2026, joint with PA Consulting).

name: CGI
notes: HMRC enterprise integration (250m). Cabinet Office digital (95m). Rapid UK growth.

name: NTT Data
notes: HM Treasury core IT deal extended to 8 years (250m total).

name: Atos
notes: MOJ platform and legacy (58m). Under corporate restructuring. Replaced by Maximus for disability assessments.

name: Sodexo
notes: Prison management: HMP Forest Bank (392m), HMP Lowdham Grange (264m).

name: G4S
notes: HMP Five Wells (300m). Immigration detention. Acquired by Allied Universal.

name: MBDA
notes: Land Ceptor missiles (118m). Portfolio Management Agreement worth 6.5bn over 10 years.

name: Amey
notes: Prison FM across 61 sites in North England (430m extension).

name: Costain
notes: HS2 rail systems tunnel and M&E (400m+).

name: Skanska
notes: Lower Thames Crossing roads in Kent (450m).

name: McKinsey
notes: Brexit support (30m share). Test & Trace (563k). CDDO strategy (3m). Low volume, high impact.

name: PA Consulting
notes: DLIS digital logistics for MOD (£113m, Feb 2026, joint with Accenture as Digital Allies consortium). Part of BMfS programme.

name: Boeing Defence UK
projects: Apache / Chinook In-Service Support (Rotary Wing Enterprise)
notes: £879m 3-year integrated in-service support contract for British Army AH-64E Apache and RAF CH-47 Chinook fleets. Awarded 15 April 2026. First time both rotary fleets unified under a single contract. Supports 700+ Boeing UK jobs and 500 supply chain jobs.
